nasb.text: and blessed be your discernment, and blessed be you, who have kept me this day from bloodshed and from avenging myself by my own hand.

esv.text: Blessed be your discretion, and blessed be you, who have kept me this day from bloodguilt and from working salvation with my own hand!

cnv.text: 你的智慧和你的為人也是應當稱讚的，因為你今天阻止了我流人的血，又阻止了我親手報仇。

ccb.text: 你很有见识，你今天拦阻我亲手杀人复仇，值得称赞。
